title: get accounts register page
description: Verify that a GET request to /accounts/register/ returns the registration page successfully without requiring authentication.

title: post accounts register with valid student details
description: Verify that a POST request to /accounts/register/ with valid student registration details creates a new user account and redirects to the appropriate dashboard.

title: get accounts login page
description: Verify that a GET request to /accounts/login/ returns the login page successfully without requiring authentication.

title: post accounts login with valid credentials
description: Verify that a POST request to /accounts/login/ with valid user credentials authenticates the user and redirects to their role-specific dashboard.

title: get accounts profile without authentication
description: Verify that a GET request to /accounts/profile/ without authentication returns a 403 error or redirects to the login page.

title: get teachers list approved only
description: Verify that a GET request to /teachers/ returns a list of only approved teachers and excludes pending, rejected, or suspended teachers.

title: get teacher profile approved teacher
description: Verify that a GET request to /teachers/<id>/ for an approved teacher returns the detailed teacher profile successfully.

title: get teacher profile pending rejected or suspended
description: Verify that a GET request to /teachers/<id>/ for a pending, rejected, or suspended teacher returns a 404 error or hides the profile.

title: post create booking with valid slot
description: Verify that a POST request to /bookings/create/<teacher_id>/ with an authenticated student and valid non-overlapping slot creates a booking with pending payment or awaiting teacher acceptance status.

title: post create booking with overlapping slot
description: Verify that a POST request to /bookings/create/<teacher_id>/ with an overlapping slot request returns a validation error preventing conflicting bookings.
